violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. -Need for quat sanitizer.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Spray bottle mislabeled. 1 bottle not labeled.
